repos.name: hyprstate
repos.blurb: Session state machine for lid events, monitor profiles, lock, suspend, and USB wake

repos.name: hyprland-voice-dictation
repos.blurb: Offline push-to-talk dictation (Parakeet ASR, all local) that types into any focused window

repos.name: sni-watcher
repos.blurb: Standalone tray watcher so icons survive bar restarts

repos.name: waybar-workspace-buttons
repos.blurb: Event-driven workspace buttons for Waybar, no polling or shelling out

repos.name: linux-multi-theme-toggle
repos.blurb: Whole-desktop light/dark switching with Material You colors

repos.name: deck-tenant
repos.blurb: Per-Steam-account homes for non-Steam apps on a shared Steam Deck

repos.name: couchcord
repos.blurb: Controller-driven Discord voice control and overlay for gamescope sessions. Join, leave, and see who's talking without leaving the game

repos.name: greetd_game_mode
repos.blurb: Hit the Guide button at the login screen, get Big Picture

repos.name: steam-notes
repos.blurb: Field notes on Steam client internals

repos.name: arch-repo
repos.blurb: Self-hosted pacman repo served from GitHub Pages, where the tools above ship from

repos.name: packaging-workflows
repos.blurb: Reusable GH Actions for Arch + COPR packaging

repos.name: greetd-config
repos.blurb: greetd + regreet login manager setup with multi-distro support and optional game mode
